classification.label: artificial porous transport verification
classification.warning: Constructed split-inlet box; not geological data, a vent, H2, or CO2.

conservation.description: Final minus initial inventory equals integrated inflow minus outflow to floating-point roundoff.

explanation.how: A prescribed Darcy flux moves stored heat and tracers left-to-right while diffusion mixes neighboring cells. Every internal face flux is applied with equal and opposite signs.
explanation.what: A middle-plane slice through an artificial 3D porous box. The lower inlet half is warm and carries source tracer; the upper half carries complementary ambient tracer.
explanation.why: This tests heat transfer, conservative species transport, open-boundary accounting, boundedness, and data plumbing before a sourced vent flow field is admitted.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.limitation: constant properties, LTE, no reaction heat

fields.label: Artificial source tracer
fields.limitation: dimensionless identity; not a chemical species

fields.label: Artificial ambient tracer
fields.limitation: dimensionless identity; not a chemical species

fields.label: Source mixing fraction
fields.limitation: analysis ratio; meaningful only for these complementary tracers

logs: heat and species monotonicity factors accepted

model.description: Cell-centered conservative finite volume with donor-cell advection, two-point diffusion, and forward Euler time integration.

parameters.label: Prescribed x Darcy flux
parameters.meaning: constant imposed filtration flux; not solved from pressure

parameters.label: Sensible-heat reference temperature
parameters.meaning: enthalpy datum; not a boundary condition

parameters.label: Tracer pore-volume diffusivity
parameters.meaning: D in the bulk flux -porosity*D*grad(c); equal for both tracers

parameters.label: Warm/source inlet fraction
parameters.meaning: grid-aligned fraction of x-min face measured from low z

runs.title: Porous heat and complementary-tracer verification
